privileged_info_summary: The task requires organizing 12 synthetically generated emails into a 'Cases' parent folder containing three subfolders: 'Harrison_Mercer' (5 emails), 'DataVault_IP' (4 emails), and 'Chen_Estate' (3 emails). Opposing counsel Marcus Webb (mwebb@hartleypatent.com, Hartley Patent Group) must be added to the address book, and emails from 'courtclerk@district.court' must be routed to a 'Court_Notices' folder. The setup script explicitly deletes any pre-existing folder structure, address book entries for Marcus Webb, and filter rules.
